title: Spicy Pilaf Casserole
description: A flavorful casserole that combines the spices of pilaf with the comfort of a classic rice dish.
instructions: Cook the Fluffed Rice according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the Vegetable Oil over medium-high heat.
Add the Nostalgic Vegetables and cook until tender.
Add the Spicy Pilaf Seasoning and stir to combine.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked Rice, Vegetable mixture, and Water. Mix well.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until heated through.
Top with Cheese or Sour Cream, if desired.
